title: Home
text:
I’m a Year 1 SIT AAI student learning data engineering, visualization, and how to turn small ideas into useful projects.

View my projects GitHub GenAI reflection

title: Home
text:
What I do


Data Engineering
I am learning how data moves from raw sources into cleaner, more useful formats.


Visualization
I am practising how to communicate patterns, trends, and insights clearly through charts and dashboards.


Machine Learning
I am experimenting with models and projects, including my first stock price prediction project.

title: Home
text:
More about me
You can find my GitHub, showcased projects, and background on the project page. I also wrote a short reflection on how I use GenAI as part of my learning process.

title: Project Page
text:
Key projects


Stock price predictor
This was my first project using machine learning. I trained an LSTM model to make future stock price predictions.

title: GenAI Reflection
text:
Reflecting on GenAI
Generative AI has become part of the way I learn, experiment, and build. I use tools like ChatGPT as a thinking partner when I am working through new concepts. The way it explains concepts to me is something I appreciate, and I enjoy creating LaTex formatted revision notes with the aid of GPT.
